creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text: qt5-gui depends on both GL and X11; the platform abstractions loaded by qt5-gui are what is actually going to call into GL. So the dependency is only "unneeded" if you have a GUI application that isn't going to run on X11 or GL, ever. I suppose if you're into Qt Automotive on FreeBSD with only the framebuffer that makes sense.
